title: Zephyr CCP-17: Add bounds-checked CBOR encoders with capacity validation
description: Implement proper buffer capacity validation in lichen_coap_encode_*_cbor functions per CCP-17 and fix the buffer overflow risk noted in a2t4. Add BUILD_ASSERT and runtime checks. Update tests. Must pass 3 clean /codereview passes before closing parent.
close_reason: CCP-17 completed with capacity validation in Zephyr CBOR encoders, BUILD_ASSERT, runtime checks. 3 codereview passes clean.
